name: midnight-protocol
description: Sig Network on Midnight: the central signet contract, the client-agnostic protocol SDK, and a minimal caller contract that exercises them end to end. Run `yarn compile` once before `build`/`test` — the contract packages and signet-midnight typecheck against the generated managed/ output.

scripts.compile: yarn workspaces foreach --all --exclude midnight-protocol --topological run compile
scripts.compile:zk: yarn workspaces foreach --all --exclude midnight-protocol --topological run compile:zk
scripts.build: yarn workspaces foreach --all --exclude midnight-protocol --topological run build
scripts.test: yarn workspaces foreach --all --exclude midnight-protocol --topological run test
